goal: Decks page: homepage 'See all' -> Decks; center the unlock toast off the navbar; logged-out deck notes become sign-in CTAs
done: (1) Homepage 'Your decks' SEE ALL link: profile.html -> decks.html (EN) / /th/decks.html (TH). (2) css/decks.css .decks-toast moved from bottom:100px (overlapped by the bottom navbar) to vertically centered (top:50%; transform translate(-50%,-50%)). (3) js/decks.js note label is now auth-aware via getCurrentUserSync(): logged-OUT shows 'Sign in to own it' for the free defaults and 'Sign in to get it' for unlock decks; logged-IN keeps the original labels. Logged-out deck tap opens the sign-in gate instead of the 'Reach Day N' toast.
verified: Local (chrome-devtools, logged out): defaults -> 'Sign in to own it', locked -> 'Sign in to get it'; injected toast centers at 50% vh; deck tap opens sign-in gate. See all -> decks.html.
